overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a hooded character in colonial-era attire walking through a misty autumn forest. The character encounters and passes a group of British soldiers marching through the woods before continuing deeper into the foggy wilderness.

events.description: group of soldiers becomes visible through the trees in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest trail toward a distant group of soldiers

entered.detail: large rocky cliff face lining the left side of the trail
dense forest of tall evergreen trees forming the backdrop
stack of cut logs and fallen branches on the right side
large moss-covered boulder on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through a dense autumn forest. Rocky outcrops line the left side while tall pine trees fill the background. The atmosphere is misty and overcast with light rain falling. In the distance, a group of soldiers becomes visible through the trees.

events.description: character approaches the column of marching soldiers on the trail
character passes the soldiers and continues forward along the path

agents.ego_description: walking past a column of British soldiers marching in formation through the forest

notable_agents.action: group of British soldiers in red coats marching in formation carrying muskets

entered.detail: thick tree trunk close to the path on the right side
thick bushes and low vegetation on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes a column of British soldiers marching through the forest. The soldiers in red uniforms carry muskets and walk in formation on the left side of the trail. Large tree trunks and dense underbrush line the path as the character continues walking through the misty woods.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest trail after passing the soldiers, moving deeper into the woods

entered.detail: foggy forest interior with reduced visibility in the distance

segments.scene_description: Having passed the soldiers, the character continues walking deeper into the dense forest. The trail winds through tall pine trees with mist settling between the trunks. The environment becomes more enclosed as the character moves away from the rocky outcrops into the heart of the woodland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty autumn forest that transitions from an open rocky trail to a dense, enclosed woodland. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path lined with rocky outcrops and tall pines under a light, overcast rain. As the character advances, the scene shifts to a close encounter with a column of red-coated British soldiers marching in formation along the left side of the trail. The camera then follows the character past the soldiers and deeper into the woods, where the path winds through thick underbrush and towering trees. Finally, the environment becomes increasingly secluded as the mist settles heavily between the trunks, moving away from the open rocks and into the heart of the forest.
